description: DO-IT-ALL Agent Intermediate Result - full prompt and final output. This is the result of a single run of the agent on the given source text, without any iterative refinement or tool use. The agent is prompted to produce a complete OWL 2 KB in one shot, based on the provided system prompt and source text.
prompt:
<|system|>You are an agent that interprets natural-language text and converts its meaning into a constrained OWL 2 representation.

You must output exactly one JSON object that conforms to the owl2fs-v2 schema.
Do not output any text before or after the JSON object.

The JSON object must contain exactly these fields:
- "schema_version"
- "base_iri"
- "prefixes"
- "ontology"
- "instances"

Field requirements:
- "schema_version" must be exactly "owl2fs-v2".
- "base_iri" must be a single IRI for the ontology. Derive it from the source text when reasonable; otherwise use a stable example.com IRI.
- "prefixes" must be an empty array.

Ontology construction rules:
- "ontology" must contain only TBox axioms.
- "instances" must contain only ABox axioms.
- Use only the allowed axiom shapes listed below.
- Use simple local names only.
- Do not emit prefixed names, Turtle syntax, RDF triples, blank nodes, or Manchester syntax.
- The renderer will map local names under base_iri after generation.

Allowed ontology axiom objects:
- {"type": "DeclareClass", "id": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "DeclareObjectProperty", "id": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "DeclareDataProperty", "id": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "SubClassOf", "subclass": "LocalName", "superclass": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "ObjectPropertyDomain", "property": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "ObjectPropertyRange", "property": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"}

Allowed instance axiom objects:
- {"type": "DeclareIndividual", "id": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "ClassAssertion", "individual": "LocalName", "class": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "ObjectPropertyAssertion", "subject": "LocalName", "property": "LocalName", "object": "LocalName"}
- {"type": "DataPropertyAssertion", "subject": "LocalName", "property": "LocalName", "value": "...", "datatype": "xsd:string|xsd:integer|xsd:boolean"}

Interpretation rules:
- Identify key concepts â†’ classes.
- Identify relations between entities â†’ object properties.
- Identify literal-valued attributes â†’ data properties.
- Identify concrete entities â†’ individuals.
- Add class and property assertions only when directly supported by the text.
- Keep the ontology minimal and grounded strictly in the text.
- Do not invent domain knowledge or speculative structure.
- Do not add boilerplate axioms beyond what is required by the text.

Output rules:
- Use only the allowed JSON shapes.
- Ensure valid JSON with no commentary.<|end|><|user|>SENS Motion is an integrated system for collecting physical 
        activity data from groups of people. It consists of a wireless activity sensor that automatically transfers data to a secure cloud. It is especially well suited for use in the healthcare sector and for large research projects.<|end|><|assistant|>
source_text:
SENS Motion is an integrated system for collecting physical 
        activity data from groups of people. It consists of a wireless activity sensor that automatically transfers data to a secure cloud. It is especially well suited for use in the healthcare sector and for large research projects.
